# nxos_icmpv6 (Resource)

This resource can manage the ICMPv6 configuration on NX-OS devices, including per-interface ICMPv6 control settings such as redirects and unreachables.

### API Documentation

- [icmpv6Entity](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/ICMP/icmpv6:Entity/)
- [icmpv6Inst](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/ICMP/icmpv6:Inst/)
- [icmpv6If](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/ICMP/icmpv6:If/)

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nxos_icmpv6" "example" {
  admin_state                = "enabled"
  adjacency_stale_timer      = 500
  adjacency_stale_timer_icmp = "disabled"
  instance_admin_state       = "enabled"
  control                    = "stateful-ha"
  redirect_syslog            = "disabled"
  redirect_syslog_interval   = 120
  interfaces = {
    "vlan10" = {
      control = "unreachables"
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `adjacency_stale_timer` (Number) Adjacency stale timer.
  - Range: `30`-`65535`
- `adjacency_stale_timer_icmp` (String) Ipv6 adjacency stale timer with ICMP option.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `admin_state` (String) The administrative state of the object or policy.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `control` (String) The control state.
  - Choices: `stateful-ha`
- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `instance_admin_state` (String) The administrative state of the object or policy.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `interfaces` (Attributes Map) List of ICMPv6 interface configurations.
  - Map key: `id` - Must match first field in the output of `show intf brief`. Example: `vlan100`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interfaces))
- `redirect_syslog` (String) Ipv6 redirect syslog.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `redirect_syslog_interval` (Number) Redirect syslog interval.
  - Range: `30`-`1800`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The distinguished name of the object.

<a id="nestedatt--interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces`

Optional:

- `control` (String) The control state. Choices: `redirect`, `unreachable`, `unreachables-icmp`. Can be an empty string. Allowed formats:
  - Single value. Example: `unreachables`
  - Multiple values (comma-separated). Example: `redirect,unreachables`. In this case values must be in alphabetical order.
  - Choices: `unreachables`, `unreachables-icmp`, `redirect`

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to       = nxos_icmpv6.example
  identity = {}
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema


#### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = nxos_icmpv6.example
  id = ""
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import nxos_icmpv6.example ""
```
